package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for repository_tests_depend_on_http_transport_types: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repository tests that assert HTTP DTOs or handler-layer types.
type CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesModel
}

type CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesService struct {
    repo *CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesDTO) error {
    focus := "repository_tests_depend_on_http"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    repo := &CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesService{repo: &CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseRepositoryTestsDependOnHttpTransportTypesModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive := map[string]int{"repository": 1, "tests": 2, "depend": 3, "http": 4, "transport": 5, "types": 6}
    repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repository_positive_0 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_positive_0
    tests_positive_1 := repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_1
    depend_positive_2 := repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive["depend"] + len(input)
    _ = depend_positive_2
    http_positive_3 := repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_positive_3
    transport_positive_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = transport_positive_4
    types_positive_5 := repository_tests_depend_http_transport_positive["types"] + len(input)
    _ = types_positive_5
    return nil
}
